metaTitle: Wheelchair Taxi to Bangalore Railway Station | WheelchairTaxi Bangalore
metaDescription: Book a wheelchair accessible taxi to KSR Bengaluru City Railway Station. Smooth transfers, punctual service, and vehicles equipped with hydraulic lifts.
h1: Wheelchair Taxi to Bangalore Railway Station
description: Catching a train shouldn't be a hassle. Our wheelchair taxis provide reliable transfers to and from KSR Bengaluru City Railway Station, complete with an automatic hydraulic lift.

cta.heading: Heading to the Train Station?
cta.subheading: Book your wheelchair accessible cab to the railway station instantly via WhatsApp.

whatsapp.label: Book via WhatsApp
whatsapp.ariaLabel: Book your wheelchair taxi via WhatsApp
